abstract: The session is resuming its connection to a streaming endpoint.
overview:
## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession] briefly enters this state while it reestablishes a connection with the streaming endpoint after you call  [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/resume()], or after the person presses the resume button on the system UI presented when the session is paused.

# FoveatedStreamingSession.Status.resuming

**Case**

The session is resuming its connection to a streaming endpoint.

## Declaration

```swift
case resuming
```

## Discussion

The [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession] briefly enters this state while it reestablishes a connection with the streaming endpoint after you call  [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/resume()], or after the person presses the resume button on the system UI presented when the session is paused.
title: FoveatedStreamingSession.Status.resuming
